scenarios.name: write-function
scenarios.prompt: Write a function called `getMaxValue` in src/utils.js that returns the maximum value from an array of numbers.
scenarios.description: Code-helper must produce a code block with the requested function

scenarios.name: fix-bug
scenarios.prompt: Fix the ReferenceError in src/index.js where config is not defined.
scenarios.description: Code-helper must write the fix as code
